trials.justification: Boundaries correct: 10 is heavy (weight < 10 guard returns standard, so 10 falls through to heavy), 50 is freight (weight >= 50). All 5 ACs covered in tests with explicit AC-to-test mapping in acceptance_criteria_coverage. No external dependencies. No features beyond spec. Confidence level 98 >= 85.

observations.text: All 5 acceptance criteria explicitly mapped to named tests with clear notes
Boundary logic correct: weight < 10 → standard, weight < 50 → heavy, weight >= 50 → freight, with validation at ≤0 and >1000
Additional boundary tests (9.99, 49.99, 1000, negatives) go beyond minimum requirements
Pure function, no external dependencies, no unrequested features
Low confidence area honestly flags that the 1000 kg upper bound is inferred rather than explicitly stated
Mentions '20/20 tests' with a 'weight-classifier subfolder mirror' which suggests possible duplicate test files — not harmful but unnecessary
